name: Account Compromise Investigation
description:
This template is used when suspicious account activity is detected, such as unusual login locations, failed login attempts, or potential credential compromise.
The objective is to investigate, assess risk, contain, and remediate the affected account(s).

tasks.title: Remediation
tasks.description:
Apply 2FA or MFA if not already enforced

Ensure endpoint is clean if compromise originated from a device

tasks.title: Triage
tasks.description:
Review alert source (SIEM, EDR, user report)

Verify unusual login patterns or brute force attempts

tasks.title: Analysis
tasks.description:
Check login history and IP reputation (Cortex analyzers)

Correlate with MISP for known compromised accounts or attacker IPs

tasks.title: Containment
tasks.description:
Lock or disable compromised account

Reset credentials if necessary

Notify affected user(s)

tasks.title: Closure
tasks.description:
Document incident, actions taken, and lessons learned

Share relevant IOCs with MISP if applicable
